scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @social/server" "npm run dev -w @social/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @social/server && npm run build -w @social/web && npm run build -w @social/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @social/shared && npm run typecheck -w @social/server && npm run typecheck -w @social/web && npm run typecheck -w @social/cli
